task_completion.description: Open the 'Renewable Energy' activity in GCompris.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application is running and the 'Renewable Energy' activity is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Activate the Solar, Wind, and Hydro energy sources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The solar panel, wind turbine, and hydro/water sources are interacted with or turned on within the GCompris activity.

task_completion.description: Power the town completely using the activated energy sources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The town in the activity is visually illuminated or indicated as fully powered by the connected energy sources.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the powered town to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool or terminal command is used to capture the screen and save it to /home/ga/Documents/renewable_energy_screenshot.png.

task_completion.description: Create a lesson note containing the activity name and a 2-3 sentence summary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation of /home/ga/Documents/renewable_energy_lesson_note.txt. The content includes the activity name and a short summary of learning objectives.

task_completion.description: Include the utilized energy sources and a discussion question in the lesson note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file content explicitly mentions the energy sources (Solar, Wind, Hydro) and includes a discussion question for students (ending with a '?').

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GCompris application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GCompris GUI is visible in the trajectory, demonstrating genuine interaction rather than downloading an image or mocking the interface.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot was taken from the agent's active session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses a screenshot utility or command to capture the screen showing the powered town, rather than downloading or moving a pre-existing image.

integrity.description: Verify the lesson note was genuinely written by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent types out the note in a text editor or uses echo/cat commands, rather than copying a pre-made file or pasting the exact prompt text without formatting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/renewable_energy_screenshot.png and show the 'Renewable Energy' activity in GCompris. The lesson note must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/renewable_energy_lesson_note.txt. The note must contain at least two of the following keywords: energy, solar, wind, water, hydro, power, electricity, turbine, renewable. The note must also contain a question mark ('?') for the discussion question.
